/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_server__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarm_server__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_server__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_server/msg/detail/scene_object__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_server__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_server/action/detail/plan__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_server__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_server/action/detail/execute__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_server__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_server/action/detail/update_planning_scene__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
